title: SMG Swiss Marketplace Group Bets On AI As Valuation Gap Widens
content:
Make better investment decisions with Simply Wall St's easy, visual tools that give you a competitive edge.

SMG Swiss Marketplace Group Holding (SWX:SMG) is rolling out new AI tools, including conversational search and automated listing descriptions. The company is using AI to refine user experience and streamline internal workflows across its digital marketplaces. These product changes come as the share price stands at CHF25.95 and recent returns have been weak over the past week, month and year to date.

SMG Swiss Marketplace Group Holding, traded under SWX:SMG, is leaning into AI driven features at a time when the share price is CHF25.95 and recent returns have been negative, with a 12.2% decline over the past week and 11.6% over the past month. Year to date, the stock is down 29.5%, so this product push sits against a backdrop of cautious sentiment around the shares.

For you as an investor, the key question is how these AI features, such as conversational search and automated listing descriptions, might affect user engagement, cost efficiency and the company’s ability to scale its marketplace platforms. The impact may become clearer as adoption data, usage patterns and any disclosed efficiency metrics are reported over time.
